company_name: Absolutely. We’re called Metro Fire Protection. We’ve been in business for about twelve years now. Our focus is mainly commercial fire protection systems. That includes sprinkler system installations, annual inspections, fire alarm maintenance, and extinguisher servicing. We also get a lot of service requests when systems malfunction or when building managers notice leaks or alarms.
business_hours: And what happens outside of office hours?
emergency_definition: That makes sense. So what would you consider an emergency situation?
